arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola reveals approximately when Manchester City will have their fate decided on 115 charges
arts.sum: Manchester City is currently facing a staggering 115 charges of alleged financial misconduct, a situation that has cast a shadow over the club's recent achievements and future prospects. I n a recent press conference, Pep Guardiola, the esteemed manager of Manchester City, provided a key update on the club's ongoing legal saga.
